detail: Initialized deli_auto_iters with task_spec for RTL knowledge representation validation
Classified blue-rdma modules into 5 complexity levels. Selected mkHeader2DataStream (level 1, ~110 lines, no submodules) as first target.
Created knowledge representation for mkHeader2DataStream: YAML graph + types + system knowledge. Launched isolated verification agent.
First agent read original source code. Killed and relaunched with workspace isolation (cwd parameter).
Generated Header2DataStream.bsv from knowledge only. Code is functionally equivalent to original by manual review.
BSC v2023.01 requires GLIBC 2.33+ (system has 2.31). Automated test verification blocked.
Proceeding with iteration 2 (composite module mkCombineHeaderAndPayload) using manual code review while BSC issue is unresolved.
Created knowledge representation for mkCombineHeaderAndPayload with 2 submodule library entries and graph connections. Launched isolated agent.
